name: list_projects
description:
List Neon projects in your account. Do not use for projects shared with you (use `list_shared_projects` instead). Supports optional `search` (filter by name or ID) and `limit` (default 10) parameters.

<notice>
Notice: Write mode active. Destructive tools are exposed. For tools with `destructiveHint: true`, NEVER invoke autonomously; always ask the user first.
</notice>

cursor.description: Specify the cursor value from the previous response to retrieve the next batch of projects.

limit.description: Specify a value from 1 to 400 to limit number of projects in the response.

search.description: Search by project name or id. You can specify partial name or id values to filter results.
